title: Sprint Retrospective Report
shortDescription: Generate a structured sprint retrospective from raw team feedback with actionable improvements.
jobsToBeDone: Turn scattered feedback into actionable items

inputs.label: Sprint Goal
inputs.example: Migrate all billing flows to Stripe v3 and ship self-serve invoice downloads

inputs.label: Raw Team Feedback
inputs.example: Liked: good collab with design. Disliked: too many scope changes mid-sprint. Wish: earlier QA involvement. Bug count was high on day 1 of release.

inputs.label: Sprint Metrics
inputs.example: Velocity: 34/40 points, Bugs escaped: 3, Sprint goal met: partial (invoice download slipped)
